query: README style, branding, documentation tone for minder project

results.title: Project conventions documented in README
results.content: Documented frontend conventions directly in README.md at the repo root: files using Ant Design components must include "use client" and custom CSS should be avoided unless unavoidable, preferring Ant Design primitives and tokens first. README.md is now the canonical in-project location for these two conventions.

results.title: Design docs: skill catalog and metadata-first graph
results.content: Added requirements/design docs for Dashboard skill CRUD and provider-agnostic Git import, and updated canonical architecture/planning docs to make GraphNode metadata-first with optional bounded reusable excerpts only. Files: docs/requirements/skill_management_and_graph_metadata.md, docs/design/skill_management_and_graph_metadata.md, docs/system-design.md, docs/plan/01-product-scope.md, docs/plan/02-architecture.md, docs/plan/03-data-model-and-tools.md, docs/plan/05-implementation-phases.md, docs/TASK_BREAKDOWN.md, docs/PROJECT_PROGRESS.md

results.title: Canonical system design doc created
results.content: Added docs/system-design.md as the canonical system architecture reference for Minder, including runtime diagrams, single-port Astro serving by Python, clean architecture boundaries, storage topology, auth flow, dashboard integration rules, frontend structure, and deployment shape. README and operator guides now link to that document instead of duplicating full architecture sections.

results.title: Minder switched to Qwen plan split
results.content: Updated the Minder planning docs to use Qwen/Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B quantized GGUF for embeddings and Qwen3.5-0.8B quantized GGUF for the local LLM, both intended to run through llama.cpp via llama-cpp-python. Split docs/PLAN.md into an index plus docs/plan/01-06 focused documents covering scope, architecture, data/tools, workflow governance, implementation phases, and operations/delivery.

results.title: Graph explorer filters and symbol history heuristics
results.content: Added graph search filters for language and last_state, made graph query scoring match git history metadata, added canvas cues for node state/history freshness, and enriched RepoScanner nodes with symbol/line-level git last-touch heuristics from blame while preserving file-level history context. Files: src/minder/tools/repo_scanner.py, src/minder/tools/graph.py, src/minder/application/admin/use_cases.py, src/minder/presentation/http/admin/api.py, src/dashboard/src/components/RepositoryGraphExplorerShell.astro, src/dashboard/src/scripts/repositories-page.ts, src/dashboard/src/lib/api/admin.ts, tests/unit/test_ingest.py, tests/integration/test_http_admin_expansion.py, docs/progress/architecture-transition-cli-edge-sync.md
